# A test of equations in EPUB

I have in-text mathematical formulas such as $\pi$, $\hat\pi$ and $X$ as well as equations such as:

\begin{equation}
\hat\pi = \frac{e^{a + X\cdot b}}{1+e^{a + X\cdot b}}
(\#eq:logisticmod)
\end{equation}

So far, neither is visualised when I open my EPUB file on my kindle. In their stead there is nothing.



\newpage
